2605.18162.title: Self-Evolving Spatial Reasoning in Vision Language Models via Geometric Logic Consistency
2605.18162.paper_summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have made striking progress, yet their spatial reasoning remains fragile: models that answer an original input correctly can still fail under paired transformations with predictable answer mappings, revealing a gap between instance-level correctness and robust spatial reasoning. To address this, we propose Spatial Alignment via Geometric Evolution (SAGE), a self-evolving framework that enforces logical consistency in VLMs through geometric and linguistic duality operations. SAGE incorporates duality consistency as an auxiliary reward within GRPO training, encouraging models to produce logically coherent answers across original and transformed inputs. A dynamic operation pool continuously probes for inconsistencies, promoting challenging operations and retiring mastered ones, so that training focuses on the most informative signals. SAGE is model-agnostic, data-efficient compared to prior GRPO methods, and can be applied as a lightweight post-training stage to any existing VLM. Experiments on video and spatial reasoning benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines and enhanced generalization to unseen data.
2605.18162.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型（VLMs）已取得顯著進展，但其空間推理仍然脆弱：能夠正確回答原始輸入的模型，在進行成對變換時仍可能失敗，且這些變換具有可預測的答案映射，顯示出實例級正確性與穩健空間推理之間的差距。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了通過幾何演化進行空間對齊（SAGE），這是一個自我演化的框架，通過幾何和語言的二元性操作來強化VLMs中的邏輯一致性。SAGE在GRPO訓練中將二元性一致性作為輔助獎勵，鼓勵模型在原始和變換輸入中產生邏輯上連貫的答案。動態操作池不斷探測不一致性，促進挑戰性操作並淘汰已掌握的操作，以便訓練集中於最具信息性的信號。SAGE是模型無關的，與之前的GRPO方法相比數據效率更高，並且可以作為輕量級的後訓練階段應用於任何現有的VLM。對視頻和空間推理基準的實驗顯示出在強基線上持續改進，並增強了對未見數據的泛化能力。
2605.18162.author: Junming Liu et.al.
2605.18162.authors: Junming Liu, Yuqi Li, Yifei Sun, Maonan Wang, Piotr Koniusz, Yirong Chen, Ding Wang
